examples: The patient is sedated with intravenous use of sedative drugs.
He was put on intravenous drip to treat his dehydration.
Studies are underway investigating the addition of a third agent, the intravenous prostanoid epoprostenol.
The procedure is generally done with intravenous sedation initially during actual placement of the implant.
She was hooked to a monitor and had an intravenous drip in her left arm.
